experimental_design: comparison of different P. falciparum strains
Similar outcomes were observed across different P. falciparum strains.
factor_value: genotype (P. falciparum NF54 GFP-Luc, P. falciparum GAP3KO)
the production of IVS from the late-arresting genetically attenuated P. falciparum GAP3KO strain was assessed
number_of_fractions: the IVS were harvested on days 11, 13, and 15
